title: Al Forthan Memorial Scholarship
html:
Oregon-based memorial scholarship requiring an oration / personal-essay submission. Yahir entered in two cycles — first the 2021 application as a Grants Pass high-school senior, then a follow-up engagement through 2022–2023. One leg of the "Renaissance + Ford + Al Forthan" triad (2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo) that funded the Grants Pass → OSU pipeline. Recurs as a real funding source even into the 2025 Austin move (2025 08 13 plan for austin — "$1,380 scholarship money" drawdown).

TL;DR

  • One of three foundational scholarships (Al Forthan + Ford Family + Renaissance) that scaffolded Yahir's OSU tuition.
  • Required a recorded oration — Yahir's public speaking self feedback note is from prepping this.
  • Documented across the entire 2020–2023 application window: prep (2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo, 2020 12 04 national scholarships december 2020, 2020 12 23 core questions to answer for essays), submission (2021 01 22 al forthan charlee stats question, 2021 01 31 Copy of Al Forthan Scholarship), follow-up (2022 02 05 Al Forthan Email, 2023 01 09 YAHIRS Al Forthan Scholarship, 2023 01 10 Al Forthan).
  • Funds were still flowing through 2025 (2025 08 13 plan for austin, 2025 12 05 ida translations).
  • Listed in Yahir's gratitude ledger — "be a Boys & Girls Club alum + donor" pay-it-forward target.

Key facts

  • Memorial scholarship. Named for Al Forthan; oration requirement ties it to his civic / community-leader legacy.
  • Multi-year engagement. Yahir didn't just apply once — he stayed in correspondence and re-applied/extended (2023 01 09 YAHIRS Al Forthan Scholarship / 2023 01 10 Al Forthan are 2023 cycle artifacts).
  • Funded the bridge years. 2025 08 13 plan for austin's explicit $1,380 line means the scholarship money was still flowing 2025 — possibly multi-year disbursement or supplemental.
  • Linked with Brenda Aguilera + Jann. The mentor-network around the application included both (2020 12 23 core questions to answer for essays, 2021 01 22 al forthan charlee stats question).
  • Public-speaking forge. 2021 01 17 FHS 215 CJ JJ F2020 / 2021 01 17 public speaking self feedback are FHS-215 (Communication) class material applied to the oration.

Chronological arc

  • 2018-10-23 — earliest admin-trace (2018 10 23 page 7 letter 11 and 14 forgot a in personal and r in our).
  • 2019 — values-formation alongside scholarship awareness (2019 09 17 money means nothing do what you love).
  • 2020-11 → 2020-12 — application planning (2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo, 2020 12 04 national scholarships december 2020, 2020 12 23 core questions to answer for essays).
  • 2021-01 — submission cycle (2021 01 14 meditate todo dump, 2021 01 17 FHS 215 CJ JJ F2020, 2021 01 17 public speaking self feedback, 2021 01 22 al forthan charlee stats question, 2021 01 31 Copy of Al Forthan Scholarship).
  • 2021-04 → 2021-05 — follow-up + interview (2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos, 2021 05 02 do a good present, 2021 05 06 230 zoom interview).
  • 2022-01 → 2022-07 — re-engagement (2022 01 17 do fafsa, 2022 02 05 Al Forthan Email, 2022 07 28 Dads house sellings).
  • 2023-01 — second cycle (2023 01 09 YAHIRS Al Forthan Scholarship, 2023 01 10 Al Forthan, 2023 01 13 Common App, 2023 01 18 Scholarship Calendar).
  • 2025 — funds still flowing (2025 08 13 plan for austin, 2025 12 05 ida translations).

Source summaries

  • 2021 01 31 Copy of Al Forthan Scholarship — submission canonical
  • 2022 02 05 Al Forthan Email — follow-up note
  • 2023 01 09 YAHIRS Al Forthan Scholarship — second-cycle application
  • 2023 01 10 Al Forthan
  • 2025 08 13 plan for austin — funds still active 2025
  • 2025 12 05 ida translations
  • 2021 01 17 public speaking self feedback
  • 2021 01 22 al forthan charlee stats question
  • 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo
  • 2021 04 10 ford osu prep todos

Plus ~14 additional application-cycle summaries.

Connections

  • ford family foundation · renaissance scholarship · jcef — scholarship triad/quad
  • brenda aguilera · jann · diana hoff — mentor network
  • grants pass or · grants pass teen era · osu — geographic context
  • college admissions — meta-process
  • debt of gratitude — the moral frame
  • family as hidden runway (synthesis) — how scholarships compounded
